question_text: Use the velocity-time graph shown below. What type of motion does the object undergo during the interval shown?

answer_key.explanation: Velocity increases linearly with time, so acceleration is constant and the motion is uniformly accelerated.
common_mistakes: Reading the line as uniform velocity.

visual.caption: Velocity-time graph for a moving object.
visual.altText: A straight line rising from the origin on a velocity-time coordinate grid with time on the horizontal axis.
